description: Techpack Creation UI input: per GT×IT L1×ISO recommendation with confidence scoring

confidence_rules.high: Top ISO ≥ 60% AND N ≥ 5 designs → auto_recommend (綠色, AI 自動選)
confidence_rules.medium: Top ISO ≥ 40% AND N ≥ 5 → recommend_with_alternatives (黃色, 推薦但可改)
confidence_rules.low: Top ISO < 40% OR N < 5 → user_select (灰色, 列選項讓人選)

note_knit_woven: 目前資料只有 Knit 品類，Woven 資料進來後需要重新計算
